what_it_does: Research code for reconstructing an avatar-like 3D head/body representation from limited portrait input.
succinct_summary: A candidate reference for moving from a Morgan portrait into a controllable 3D avatar asset.
possible_use: Study reconstruction assumptions, preprocessing, and asset outputs for a Morgan 3D avatar pipeline.
important_notes: Research repo; check model weights, runtime requirements, and output rig compatibility before planning integration. README hint: <div align="center">
